hindiTranslation: जिनकी बुद्धि तदाकार हो रही है, जिनका मन तदाकार हो रहा है, जिनकी स्थिति परमात्मतत्वमें है, ऐसे परमात्मपरायण साधक ज्ञानके द्वारा पापरहित होकर अपुनरावृत्ति परमगति को प्राप्त होते हैं ॥
englishTranslation: Those whose intellect is fixed in That, whose mind is That, who are established in That, and who are devoted to That, go to the state of no return, their impurities washed away by knowledge.
essence: Complete alignment with the supreme reality ends the cycle of return.
speaker: Krishna
